Hero.headline: Ship Code That Actually Works
Hero.subheadline: Stop wrestling with boilerplate and debugging AI hallucinations. We generate production-ready code that passes your tests, follows your conventions, and integrates with your stack.
Hero.socialProof: Trusted by 10,000+ developers at Stripe, Vercel, and open-source projects shipping to millions.

items.title: Context-Aware Generation
items.description: Reads your codebase, dependencies, and conventions — not just the current file.

items.title: Test-Verified Output
items.description: Every generated block runs through your test suite before it reaches your editor.

items.title: Zero-Config Integration
items.description: Works with your existing stack. No plugins, no migrations, no setup rituals.

items.title: Production-Grade Patterns
items.description: Generates code that follows your team's standards — linting, types, docs included.

items.title: Incremental Refactoring
items.description: Rewrites legacy code in small, reviewable chunks with full git history preserved.

items.title: Local-First Architecture
items.description: Your code never leaves your machine. Optional cloud sync, never cloud dependency.

tiers.name: Free
tiers.cta: Start Building — No credit card required

items.question: Is my code sent to your servers?
items.answer: No. Our local-first architecture means your code stays on your machine. The AI model runs locally or via your own API keys. Optional cloud features are opt-in, not opt-out.

items.question: How is this different from GitHub Copilot or Cursor?
items.answer: Copilot completes lines. Cursor edits files. We generate runnable, tested, production-ready modules that understand your entire codebase — dependencies, tests, conventions, and all.

items.question: What languages and frameworks do you support?
items.answer: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Ruby, Java, and C#. Frameworks include React, Next.js, Django, Rails, Spring Boot, and anything with a test runner.

items.question: How do you handle privacy and compliance?
items.answer: SOC 2 Type II certified. No code retention. No training on your data. Full audit logs available on Team plans. GDPR and CCPA compliant by design.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: Yes. Pro and Team plans have a 30-day money-back guarantee. No usage limits, no questions asked. Free plan is free forever.

items.question: Do you offer enterprise or custom deployments?
items.answer: Yes. Team plan covers most organizations. For air-gapped environments, custom models, or enterprise procurement, contact our sales team — we respond within 24 hours.

CTA.headline: Stop debugging AI-generated broken code.
CTA.trustLine: No setup. No credit card. No hallucinations.
